violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

Juice was observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

Working containers of sauces are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025
Cases of water were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen and bar areas. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Inspector provided test strips during inspector. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

Inspector observed a pipe originating from an unknown/unidentifiable source draining into a basin of the 3-bay sink. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025
